subject: ZooKeeper and Kafka deployment changes
commit_message:
ZooKeeper and Kafka deployment changes

Support creation of ZooKeeper Ensemble and Multiple Kafka Brokers

Issue-ID: DMAAP-899
Change-Id: Id2318a3e9ff03c60222142169bb9e900e26f2577
Signed-off-by: sunil unnava <sunil.unnava@att.com>

Hi Borislov, Can you respond to my comments

Patch Set 6:

> (2 comments)

You can look at appc charts, they are a good example.
There is a presentation that I gave during Beijing DDF that explains charts: https://wiki.onap.org/download/attachments/25434845/ONAP%20OOM%20Helm%20Charts%20Ownership%20Beijing.pdf?version=1&modificationDate=1529468776000&api=v2

Patch Set 6:

> (2 comments)

Also, you do not need to allocate new nodePorts as you are not using ones.

Patch Set 9:

Borislav,

I referred the APPC charts to address the 2 comments.

Fix the Zookeeper and Kafka service yaml: APPC also not added the nodeport section to the headless service, so I have not updated the service.yaml file as Zookeeper and Kafka are the headless services

Fix the Persistence Volume creation and binding: I have added the  condition check to create the Persistent Volume and mount it to a volume , similar to the APPC persistent volume

Please review and merge the changes
